name: Emma Wilson
bio: Music teacher by day, festival goer by night. Triple J is my religion.

name: Jack Thompson
bio: Surfer. Producer. Loves a good drop and a sick beat.

name: Olivia Brown
bio: UQ musicology student. Obsessed with Aussie hip-hop.

name: Noah Williams
bio: Sound engineer at local venue. If it's loud, I'm proud.

name: Charlotte Smith
bio: Vinyl collector. 300+ records and counting. Mostly Aussie indie.

name: Liam Jones
bio: Ex-tradie turned DJ. Spinning house and techno up and down the coast.

name: Mia Taylor
bio: Dark Mofo regular. Dark electronic, ambient, experimental.

name: Oliver Davis
bio: Public servant by day, bedroom producer by night. Future bass enthusiast.

name: Ava Martin
bio: Nursing student who lives for live music. Seen every Splendour since 2018.

name: William Baker
bio: Remote community arts worker. Bringing music to the Territory.

name: Isabella Clark
bio: Gong local. R&B and neo-soul are my love languages.

name: Ethan White
bio: Footy and drum & bass. That's all you need to know.

name: Sophia Hall
bio: Yoga instructor who curates the perfect morning playlist. Chill vibes only.

name: Lucas Young
bio: Dive instructor. Underwater photographer. Tropical house addict.

name: Harper Green
bio: Studying audio production. Making beats in my share house at 3am.

bio: Kapa haka performer. Bringing Māori sound to the world.

name: Tane Mahuta
bio: Named after the forest god. Producer of deep, organic house.

name: Moana Tui
bio: Pacific soul singer. NZ Music Award nominee 2024.

name: Hemi Kauri
bio: Reggae bassist. Touring both islands. Roots music runs deep.

bio: Taonga pūoro player. Traditional instruments meet modern production.

bio: Student radio host. Championing Māori and Pasifika artists.

bio: Chinese-Australian. Classically trained pianist gone electronic.

bio: Japanese-Aussie. Anime OST collector. Future funk producer.

bio: Indian-Australian. Bollywood to bass — my sets cross continents.
